title: BS Information Technology
description: Learn software development, networking, cybersecurity, and web development through hands-on real-world projects.

title: BS Computer Science
description: Deep study of algorithms, artificial intelligence, data structures, and systems programming for advanced computing careers.

title: BS Hospitality Management
description: Prepares students for the hotel, restaurant, and tourism industry with a strong focus on service excellence and operations.

title: BS Tourism Management
description: Study travel operations, tour guiding, and sustainable tourism for careers in the local and international tourism industry.

title: BS Office Administration
description: Training in administrative management, business communication, and office systems for the modern professional workplace.

title: Bachelor of Early Childhood Education
description: Develops future teachers for early childhood and elementary levels with a strong foundation in child development and pedagogy.

title: Bachelor of Technology & Livelihood Education
description: Trains educators to teach technology and livelihood subjects at the secondary level, combining theory with practical skills.

title: BS Entrepreneurship
description: Covers business planning, innovation, and enterprise development for students who want to start and grow their own businesses.
